title: 'The Fable' Gets Second Season
content: Production company VAP announced a second season for the The Fable television anime on Thursday. The new season will adapt the Yamaoka-hen ( Yamaoka Arc ). The official website also revealed the returning cast and staff, along with a teaser visual (pictured).
author: MyAnimeList

title: 6th Be Forever Yamato: Rebel 3199 Film's Teaser Previews Plot Twist
content: The official X/Twitter account for Yamato yo Towa ni: Rebel 3199 ( Be Forever Yamato : Rebel 3199), the latest project in the Space Battleship Yamato remakes, revealed on Wednesday a teaser video and visual for the sixth film Aoi Meikyū (Blue Labyrinth).
author: ANN

title: Dragon Ball Breaks Hearts With The Perfect April Fools Prank
content: It’s April Fool’s Day, and the entertainment world isn’t immune to succumbing to hilarious pranks and wild news stories that turn out not to be true. Much like the worlds of television and movies, the anime industry will often take part in the festivities by creating hilarious jokes that play on its franchises.
author: ComicBook

title: Invincible Makes Major Change to Classic Comic Book Character
content: Invincible’s fourth season is well underway, pitting Mark Grayson against various villains and the giant threat that is the Viltrumite Empire. While the fourth episode introduced a completely original story that never took place in the source material, the Amazon Prime Video series has thrown another massive curveball…
author: ComicBook

title: Dan Da Dan Manga Listed to Take 1-Month Break, But Editor States Manga Will Continue as Scheduled (Updated)
content: The latest chapter of Yukinobu Tatsu 's DAN DA DAN manga on Shonen Jump+ announced on Tuesday that the series will take a break for a month and return on May 5. Update: DAN DA DAN manga editor Shihei Lin posted on X/Twitter on Tuesday that there was a mistake in the preview and that there actually is a new chapter…
author: ANN

title: Saved by the Ice Cold Prince's Embrace Manga Gets Light Anime in July
content: The Nippan Group's digital publisher Funguild announced on Wednesday that Hokuhoku Yakiimo and Kusabi Kurokawa's Saved by the Ice Cold Prince's Embrace (Migawari Reijō o Sukutta no wa Reikoku Mujihi na Kōri no Ōji no Ai Deshita or literally, What Saved the Stand-In for the Aristocratic Daughter Was the Cold-Hearted,…
author: ANN

title: 'Love Live! Hasunosora Jogakuin School Idol Club' Gets TV Anime in January 2027
content: The official X (formerly Twitter) account for the Hasunosora Jogakuin School Idol Club ( Hasunosora Girls' High School Idol Club ) project announced a television anime on Tuesday, scheduled to premiere in January 2027. The Love Live!
author: MyAnimeList

title: An Umamusume X Midori no Makibao Collaboration Is Underway
content: An Uma Musume: Pretty Derby and Midori no Makibao collaboration event is now underway. As part of the event, the collab’s PR team has released a crossover video of the two franchises.
author: Anime Corner

title: Every Episode of My Hero Academia: Vigilantes Season 2, Ranked
content: My Hero Academia: Vigilantes Season 2 is officially over, and the second chapter of the spinoff is a bit of a mixed bag. It gets off to a slower start, with its earliest installments fluctuating in quality.
author: ComicBook

title: Netflix Reveals One Piece Season 2 Is Lagging Behind Season 1
content: One Piece Season 2 sees a significant drop in viewership compared to Season 1, as recently reported by Netflix itself. The highly anticipated sequel to the live-action adaptation of the series, widely known for breaking the curse of poor live-action adaptations, arrived on March 10, 2026, and has received no shortage…
author: ComicBook
